name: Employment Contract
content:
EMPLOYMENT AGREEMENT

This Employment Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{startDate}} between {{employer}} ("Employer") and {{employee}} ("Employee").

WHEREAS, Employer wishes to employ Employee, and Employee wishes to be employed by Employer, on the terms and conditions set forth herein;

NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and agreements herein, the parties agree as follows:

1. POSITION AND DUTIES
(a) Employee shall serve as {{position}}
(b) Employee shall report to {{reportingTo}}
(c) Employee shall perform duties as assigned by Employer
(d) Employee's primary place of work shall be as designated by Employer

2. TERM
(a) Employment shall commence on {{startDate}}
(b) This is employment at-will, terminable by either party at any time

3. COMPENSATION
(a) Employer shall pay Employee an annual salary of {{salary}}, payable in accordance with Employer's standard payroll practices
(b) Salary is subject to applicable deductions and withholdings
(c) Salary may be reviewed annually

4. BENEFITS
Employee shall be entitled to the following benefits:
{{benefits}}

5. HOURS AND OVERTIME
(a) Employee shall work such hours as are necessary to perform job duties
(b) Overtime compensation shall be provided in accordance with applicable law
(c) Employee shall comply with Employer's timekeeping procedures

6. AT-WILL EMPLOYMENT
Employment is at-will and may be terminated by either party at any time, with or without cause, subject to applicable law.

7. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION
Employee agrees to maintain confidentiality of all proprietary and confidential information.

8. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
All work product created by Employee during employment shall be the exclusive property of Employer.

9. DISPUTE RESOLUTION
Any disputes shall be resolved in accordance with the laws of {{jurisdiction}}.

10. ENTIRE AGREEMENT
This constitutes the entire agreement between the parties.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF:

EMPLOYER: {{employer}}
By: _____________________
Name: ___________________
Title: ____________________
Date: ____________________

EMPLOYEE: {{employee}}
Signature: ________________
Date: ____________________
